user.description: Enter the credentials you use in the Snoop Cube app.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the PetTec / Meari cloud.
error.logged_elsewhere: Meari rejected our session. If the Snoop Cube app is also signed in to this account, log it out (use a dedicated account for HA).
error.no_feeders: Login worked, but no feeder devices (e.g. Cam Buddy) were found on this account.
